ab: maladay kaku aci ina midang ayza a demiad.
en: I went out with my mother today.

ab: langdaw ku tapuku nu demiad, caay ka sienaw caay ka caledes ku demiad, banihiw ku bali.
ch: 白天的天空很藍，天氣不冷也不熱，風很涼爽
en: The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

ab: i lutulutukan kami mukan tu pang, mapacilal ku uzip, sadihku sa.
ch: 我們在草地上吃著麵包，陽光灑在身上，非常溫暖。
en: We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.

ab: kalahukan, masumad tu ku tapuku sumanah sa.
en: In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

ab: mipalita kaku ci inaan, kya sumanah ku tapuku.
ch: 我問媽媽，為甚麼天空是紅色的。
en: I asked my mother why the sky is red.

ab: sakamu sa ci ina, hakay a tayni ku baliyus.
ch: 媽媽說，可能是颱風要來了。
en: Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

ab: u labi nayay ku ladem i pabaw, tahekal tu ku bunac.
ch: 晚上天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

ab: taluma’ay a zazan, miyukiw kaku tu bunac.
ch: 在回家的路上，我跟星星許願。
en: On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

ab: adasay amana ka tayni ku baliyus, maydih henay kaku tahkal midang.
ch: 希望颱風不要來，我還想再出去玩。
en: I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.
